title: Control Inheritance and Default Values
summary: Build and verify css inheritance initial in nested survey component theme boundary through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css inheritance initial from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css inheritance initial without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the nested survey component theme boundary case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which claim preserves css inheritance initial when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: nested survey component theme boundary.
steps.why: Control Inheritance and Default Values makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in nested survey component theme boundary.

content.text: Many text properties inherit; most box and layout properties do not. Initial selects a property’s specification-defined initial value, inherit explicitly copies the parent’s computed value, unset chooses inherit or initial according to the property, revert rolls back the current origin, and currentColor reuses the computed color. Deliberate boundaries reduce duplicated declarations and surprising leaks. Apply it to nested survey component theme boundary.
